verdicts.corrected_value: Shared inbox and customer communication platform for teams (email, chat, social) with APIs and SDKs to integrate and extend Front.
verdicts.reasoning: The description accurately reflects the information available on the homepage, which describes Front as a customer service platform that integrates various communication channels.
The URL provided for authentication methods returns a 404 error, meaning the evidence for the claim is not accessible.
The Help Center confirms that developers can create personal API tokens without needing human approval or a paid plan, supporting the claim of self-serve access.
The developer portal confirms the existence of a Core API (REST) and provides documentation covering various product objects, supporting the claim of a REST API surface.
The evidence indicates that public documentation and self-serve token creation are available, allowing developers to build with the REST API immediately, thus confirming the buildability claim.
